name: conversion-os
description: Conversion OS Foundation — the client-operations AI operating system for agencies and consultancies, free tier. A markdown vault becomes your firm's compounding memory: adaptive onboarding (/setup), self-contained client workspaces with one-screen strategist briefs (/client), and a daily operating rhythm (/daily). Solo and Agency modes. Pro adds reports, health scoring, lifecycle, autopilot, audits, and team seats.
